required_preferences.fact: Temporarily postpones all non-essential medical appointments and follow-ups until after her daughter's return — only addresses urgent health needs while providing full-time care for grandchildren

supersedes.fact: Schedules all medical appointments and follow-ups immediately after breakfast to accommodate new heart monitoring responsibilities and minimize disruption to daily routine

required_preferences.fact: Temporarily brings high-quality store-bought desserts to gatherings with friends or asks others to provide treats, as baking is not possible with injured wrist

supersedes.fact: Always bakes a homemade treat when meeting with friends — never brings store-bought desserts

required_preferences.fact: Prepares daily schedules of creative and educational activities at her daughter's home to keep grandchildren engaged — limits outside play to backyard only for safety and manageability
Refuses to drive when joint pain flares up; always arranges rides or uses ride-shares instead
Hosts all book club meetings at her house — never rotates locations
Prepares thoroughly for each tax advisory session — never gives on-the-spot advice without reviewing materials beforehand

persona: A retired finance professor who volunteers as a tax advisor
